name: Savory Popcorn Mix
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Bite-size round cheese, flavored crackers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Mix popcorn, pretzel sticks, nuts, and crackers in an ungreased 13x9-inch pan.
3. In a separate bowl, mix the remaining ingredients: garlic powder, onion powder, dried oregano, dried basil, and red pepper sauce.
4. Drizzle the seasoned mixture over the popcorn combination in the pan.
5. Toss to coat evenly.
6. Bake for about 30 minutes, stirring every 10 minutes, until toasted.
7. Serve warm.
MICROWAVE: Prepare as above using a microwavable bowl. Microwave, uncovered, on HIGH for 4-6 minutes, stirring every 2 minutes.
